GSP Stadium

The home of APOEL FC — Nicosia's iconic football arena

Stadium Facts

Capacity22,859
OpenedOctober 6, 1999
LocationNicosia, Cyprus
Home ToAPOEL FC & AC Omonia

Visit Us

AddressStadium AvenueNicosia, Cyprus
ParkingAvailable on match days
Public TransportBus lines 171, 172, 173

Stadium Gallery

Match Day Atmosphere
Pitch View
Stadium Exterior

Plan Your Visit

Experience the roar of 22,859 fans at GSP Stadium. Ticket sales open 7 days before each match. Arrive early to enjoy the pre-match atmosphere.

APOEL

APOEL Football Club — Cyprus's most successful football club. Join us in celebrating our legacy and supporting our team.
